Mercenary — grizzled human with shrapnel scars across shaved head and one milky-blind eye, wearing tactical vest covered in ammunition pouches, plasma rifle slung across back
Navigator — slender six-fingered alien with iridescent skin and elongated skull, wearing navigator's robes embedded with holographic star-charts, carrying an ancient astrolabe
Scavenger — wiry human youth with cybernetic jaw replacement and wild tangled hair, wearing salvaged vacuum-suit panels stitched together, carrying toolkit of improvised instruments
Warlord — towering crustacean-like alien with segmented armor plating and four glowing eyes, wearing trophy-draped battle harness, energy blade crackling in clawed hand
Sniper — battle-scarred human woman with burn tissue covering half her face and augmented targeting eye, wearing ghillie-cloak over matte-black armor, railgun beside her
Commander — imposing figure in midnight-blue power armor with scratched visor and command insignia, worn officer's cloak, plasma sword hilt at belt,战marks on gauntlets
Archaeologist — lean tentacled alien with wise ancient eyes and weathered grey skin, wearing expedition suit lined with artifact pouches, translating device strapped to forearm
Pilot — cocky young human with cybernetic hand and flight-suit collar popped, helmet tucked under arm covered in kill-silhouettes, lucky charm dangling from utility belt
Android — skeletal chrome combat-droid with exposed hydraulics and one red optical sensor, battle-scarred chassis, carrying heavy assault cannon, human dog-tags welded to chest-plate
Medic — four-eyed insectoid with delicate antennae and chitinous face-plates, wearing field medical armor with glowing emergency pouches, surgical tools integrated into forearm gauntlets
Smuggler — roguish human with salt-and-pepper stubble and a jagged scar bisecting one eyebrow, wearing worn leather duster over flight suit, blaster holstered low on hip
Engineer — stocky amphibian-skinned alien with broad flat head and gills along neck, wearing grease-stained jumpsuit with tool harness, plasma torch clipped to belt
Bounty hunter — hulking armored warrior in dented crimson plate with cracked faceplate and shoulder-mounted tracking array, disruptor rifle mag-locked across back, restraint cables coiled at waist
Trader — sharp-eyed human with silver facial tattoos and both ears replaced by communication implants, wearing layered merchant robes with hidden pockets, data-slate strapped to wrist
Soldier — battle-hardened human with prosthetic legs and chest scarred by shrapnel, wearing combat fatigues with unit patches, pulse rifle carried at ready, grenades on bandolier
Diplomat — elegant three-eyed humanoid with luminescent silver skin and cranial ridges, wearing formal envoy robes adorned with peace symbols, translation device hovering near shoulder
Mystic — gaunt horned alien with deep-set eyes and ritualistic facial brands, wearing tattered ceremonial armor hung with carved bone charms, staff topped with glowing crystal
Drifter — war-weary human with grey ponytail and cybernetic spine visible at neck, wearing patched colony jacket over salvaged gear, machete strapped across weathered backpack
Cyborg — sleek android frame with half-human face showing beneath damaged synth-skin, one arm fully mechanical ending in weapon ports, tactical vest over exposed machinery
Captain — barrel-chested reptilian with scarred hide and missing horn, wearing naval long-coat over void-suit, antique sidearm holstered, star-maps tattooed on scaled forearms
Spy — lithe human with mirrored cybernetic eyes and neural-jack ports behind ears, wearing adaptive stealth-suit that shimmers like oil, data-spike concealed in wrist sheath
Mechanic — burly eight-limbed crustacean with chipped carapace and tool-scarred claws, wearing industrial exo-rig with welding apparatus, hydraulic wrench gripped in primary limb
